title: Pan-Seared Trout with Crispy Toastie
description: A simple and delicious recipe for pan-seared trout served with a crispy toastie.
instructions: 1. Rinse the trout fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Season the trout with salt and pepper.
3. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the butter to the skillet and let it melt.
5. Add the trout fillets to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side.
6. While the trout is cooking, toast the bread slices until crispy.
7. Assemble the toastie by placing the toasted bread slices on a flat surface.
8. Place a slice of cheese on top of each bread slice.
9. Once the trout is cooked, serve it on top of the toastie.
